revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Tol|en>Tol]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]</noinclude>"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed fixed]]" to "[[Category:templates to do mass undos on]]"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects B]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bo here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{labels|}}}|no | {{Bo-textonly|lang=bo|1={{{t}}}|ume={{{ume|}}}}} <{{{w}}}> | {{#if:{{{t|}}} | {{#if:{{{lang|}}} | [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Tibetan]] | [[Tibetan script|{{#if:{{{script|}}}|Tibetan script|Tibetan}}]] }}: {{Bo-textonly |lang=bo |1={{{t}}} |ume={{{ume|}}} }} }}{{#if:{{{w|}}} | {{#if:{{{t|}}}|,}} [[:en:Wylie transliteration|Wylie]]: ''{{{w}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{s|}}} |, [[:en:THL Simplified Phonetic Transcription|THL]]: ''{{{s}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{z|}}} |, [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|ZYPY]]: ''{{{z}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{o|}}} |, [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|ZYPY]]: ''{{{o}}}'' }}{{#if:{{{l|}}} |, [[:en:Standard Tibetan|Lhasa dialect]]: {{IPA-bo|{{{l}}}|}} }}{{#if:{{{h|}}} |, [[:en:Tibetan pinyin|ZYPY]]: ''{{{z}}}'' }} }}{{main other|}} {{documentation}} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] {{Draft categories| [[Category:Articles containing Standard Tibetan-language text]] }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
